files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,63 @@
+name: Supply Chain Audit
+
+on:
+  schedule:
+    - cron: "23 5 * * 1"
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+env:
+  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+
+jobs:
+  supply-chain-audit:
+    name: cargo-audit + cargo-deny
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 45
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Clone sibling dependencies
+        run: |
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch ../frankensearch
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync ../asupersync
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/sqlmodel_rust ../sqlmodel_rust
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite ../frankensqlite
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui ../frankentui
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust ../beads_rust
+
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          cache-on-failure: true
+
+      - name: Install supply-chain tooling
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          cargo install --locked cargo-audit cargo-deny
+
+      - name: Run cargo-audit baseline
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          # Weekly audit lane stays green by pinning the known current baseline:
+          # - RUSTSEC-2023-0071: rsa timing advisory, no published fix yet
+          # - RUSTSEC-2026-0098 / 0099: rustls-webpki lockfile pin pending dependency refresh
+          cargo audit \
+            --ignore RUSTSEC-2023-0071 \
+            --ignore RUSTSEC-2026-0098 \
+            --ignore RUSTSEC-2026-0099
+
+      - name: Enforce cargo-deny async/runtime policy
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          cargo deny check bans -c deny.toml --hide-inclusion-graph

@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+[graph]
+all-features = true
+
+[bans]
+multiple-versions = "allow"
+
+# Ratchet policy:
+# - This repo is asupersync-only and must not grow new tokio/reqwest/hyper/tower ingress.
+# - The current legacy chain is still present transitively via fastembed/hf-hub and
+#   beads_rust/self_update, so those wrappers are allowed temporarily.
+# - Any new path to these crates outside the listed wrappers fails CI immediately.
+deny = [
+  { crate = "tokio", wrappers = ["h2", "hyper", "hyper-rustls", "hyper-tls", "hyper-util", "reqwest", "tokio-native-tls", "tokio-rustls", "tokio-util", "tower"], reason = "Project policy is asupersync-only. Current legacy tokio ingress is tolerated only through the known reqwest/hyper chain until those upstream dependencies are removed." },
+  { crate = "reqwest", wrappers = ["hf-hub", "self_update"], reason = "Use asupersync::http::h1 for HTTP. Current reqwest ingress is tolerated only via fastembed/hf-hub and beads_rust/self_update until those are retired." },
+  { crate = "hyper", wrappers = ["reqwest", "self_update", "hyper-rustls", "hyper-tls", "hyper-util"], reason = "No new hyper-based runtime stack. Existing reqwest/self_update ingress is grandfathered temporarily." },
+  { crate = "tower", wrappers = ["reqwest", "tower-http"], reason = "No new tower adoption. Existing reqwest chain is tolerated temporarily." },
+  { crate = "axum", reason = "Project policy is asupersync-only; do not introduce axum." },
+  { crate = "async-std", reason = "Project policy is asupersync-only; do not introduce async-std." },
+  { crate = "smol", reason = "Project policy is asupersync-only; do not introduce smol." },
+]
